# weevr

> Configuration-driven execution framework for Spark in Microsoft Fabric.
> Users declare data shaping intent in YAML; a stable PySpark engine
> interprets that intent to execute optimized, repeatable data
> transformations.

## Documentation

- [Docs home](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/)
- [Thread YAML schema](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/reference/yaml-schema/thread/)
- [Weave YAML schema](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/reference/yaml-schema/weave/)
- [Loom YAML schema](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/reference/yaml-schema/loom/)
- [Configuration keys](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/reference/configuration-keys/)

## JSON Schema

Machine-readable schema files for LLM and IDE consumption:

- [thread.json](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/blob/main/docs/schema/thread.json)
- [weave.json](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/blob/main/docs/schema/weave.json)
- [loom.json](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/blob/main/docs/schema/loom.json)
- [weevr.json](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/blob/main/docs/schema/weevr.json) (combined)

## Key Concepts

- [Thread, Weave, Loom hierarchy](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/concepts/thread-weave-loom/)
- [Config resolution and variable interpolation](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/guides/config-resolution/)
- [Dimension modeling](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/guides/dimension-modeling/)
- [Fact tables](https://ardent-data.github.io/weevr/guides/fact-tables/)

## Examples

- [examples/](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/tree/main/examples) directory

## Full Context

For a self-contained reference document suitable for pasting into an
LLM context window, see [llms-full.txt](https://github.com/ardent-data/weevr/blob/main/llms-full.txt).
